title: Ghast Backport
body:
## **ABOUT:**
This resource pack backports new ghast textures from 1.21.6. 
## **COMPATIBILITY:**
Minecraft: Java Edition 1.20+ is supported.

Optional: [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home) or [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) is required.
## **SCREENSHOTS:**
![Ghast with new textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wo4diTLd/images/c2ffda949535033f803c73baf0b52efe91276aa1_350.webp)
